sections.paragraph:
πεμπταῖος, α, ον (cp. πέμπτος; Hom. et al.; pap; EpArist 175) pert. to the fifth (day), on the fifth (day) ἤλθομεν πεμπταῖοι we came in five days Ac 20:6 D (Diod S 14, 103, 2 π.=‘on the fifth day’; Arrian, Anab. 1, 29, 1 ἀφικνεῖται πεμπταῖος).—DELG s.v. πέντε.

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Arrian Arrian = Flavius Arrianus, I–II a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 794
